item.description:
Muesli 0.6.9

This release focuses on meeting transcription reliability, summary backend flexibility, and a cleaner dictionary editing workflow.

What's New

  • More meeting summary backends: Added LM Studio plus custom OpenAI-compatible and Anthropic-compatible summary endpoints, with settings validation and endpoint normalization.
  • Background meeting processing: Stopping a meeting no longer has to block the app while transcription and summarization finish, and completion notifications are handed off more reliably.
  • Better meeting detection: Browser audio by itself no longer creates false meeting candidates; meeting detection now requires stronger input activity evidence.
  • Calendar reliability fixes: The Coming Up section and calendar monitor now start correctly for legacy meeting settings and meeting-detection configurations.
  • Dictionary UI polish: Dictionary rows are more compact, and threshold editing now uses a dedicated popover slider for clearer tuning.
  • Expanded tests: Added coverage for meeting detection, summary backend readiness, notification handoff, dictionary threshold editing, and update-flow policy.

Signed, notarized, and stapled by Apple.
